notes: The Desktop app is the primary interactive operator surface.
The CLI remains the complete baseline for headless operation and automation.
The shared Operator UI source is currently built from apps/operator-web.
The Desktop app launches a packaged runtime executable first when present.
The Desktop app monitors runtime reachability and restarts its owned runtime child when needed.
Source checkouts may fall back to the repo-local tsx runtime entrypoint for development.
Desktop, CLI, TUI, and Web share runtime/store-backed session data.
The Desktop frontend must not create a second product API.
